name: Zhejiang Xidamen New Material Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Xidamen New Material Co.,Ltd. focuses on the research, development, production, and sales of environmentally friendly and high-performance new materials. The company's offerings include various types of modified plastics, composite materials, and related products used in diverse applications such as automotive, electronics, and construction, and they are located in Zhejiang Province, China. They aim to provide innovative material solutions for different industries.
